design_philosophy: Mobile-first, gamified, non-intimidating, Duolingo-style. Relies on tactile 'chunky' UI elements, emotional character reactions, and generous rounded geometry.

components.button_primary: w-full bg-[#58CC02] text-white rounded-2xl py-4 font-bold text-lg border-b-[6px] border-[#46A302] hover:bg-[#4ddb00] active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[6px] transition-all
components.button_secondary: w-full bg-white text-[#1E293B] rounded-2xl py-4 font-bold text-lg border-2 border-slate-200 border-b-[6px] hover:bg-slate-50 active:border-b-2 active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all
components.quiz_card: bg-[#FFFDF7] rounded-3xl border-2 border-slate-200 p-6 shadow-[0_8px_0_0_rgba(226,232,240,1)]
components.category_card: bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-slate-200 p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 hover:border-[#FF822D] hover:bg-[#FFFDF7] cursor-pointer transition-all shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(226,232,240,1)] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-[4px]
components.progress_bar_fill: h-full bg-[#FF822D] rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out
components.radar_chart: Use Recharts library. Radar component should use #FF822D fill with 0.4 opacity, and #FF822D stroke. Ensure PolarGrid is muted (#E2E8F0).

icons_and_assets.style: Duotone for categories, Fill for badges. Size 32px to 64px.
icons_and_assets.badges: Use golden-colored Phosphor icons wrapped in circular containers with heavy drop shadows to resemble physical badges.

testing_attributes.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., data-testid='submit-answer-button', data-testid='category-card-english').

instructions_to_main_agent: Import 'Fredoka' and 'Nunito' fonts from Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement chunky Duolingo-style buttons using the exact Tailwind classes provided in the components block.
Use 'react-confetti' for the celebration screen. Do not just use a background image.
For Foxy the mascot, use the provided media URLs (mascot_neutral, mascot_happy) as fallbacks, but feel free to structure a solid avatar container.
Ensure the UI layout is strictly mobile-first. Restrict max-width on desktop to 'max-w-md mx-auto' to emulate a phone app experience.
Build the 7 question formats keeping the card wrapper consistent.
Use Recharts for the results report radar chart.
Add 'data-testid' attributes extensively across all interactive components.
